contexts.context: ...was never mean. A bashfulness, next to <mark>sheepishness</mark>, kept him down: but he always courted independence...
...of merit in him, through the cloud that his <mark>sheepishness</mark> threw over him, and, knowing how low his fortune...
...curiosity, the officious good temper, and the <mark>sheepish</mark> cowardice, of this mean atom of human nature...
